hook.name: Zora Creator Hook v1.1.2 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for Zora Creator Coins that initializes multi-curve liquidity positions on pool creation and automatically collects LP fees after each swap, converts them to a backing currency, and distributes market rewards to creators and trade referrers. Supports governed liquidity migration to new hook implementations via an upgrade gate contract.
